title: Spiders Shoot Webs
description: Spiders shoot webs to trap their prey
body:
# 🕷 Spiders Shoot Webs (Beta)

Spiders are no longer just close-range hunters.

With this mod installed, spiders can now **shoot webs at fast-moving players**, forcing you to rethink how you fight — and how you run.

---

## What Changes?

When a spider is chasing you and you try to sprint away, it may:

- Stop briefly  
- Lock onto you  
- Fire a web projectile  
- Leave a cobweb where it lands  

That cobweb can slow you down, block movement, or reshape the battlefield in tight spaces.

Running blindly through caves is no longer always safe.

---

## Designed to Feel Vanilla+

- Web shots are situational — not constant spam  
- Spiders still use melee attacks and leap behavior  
- The new ability adds pressure without completely replacing vanilla combat  

The goal is to make spiders feel smarter and slightly more dangerous, without turning them into ranged monsters.

---

## ⚠ Beta Notice

This mod is currently in **Beta**.

Attack timing, range, cooldowns, and movement thresholds may change as balancing continues.

Future updates will likely introduce configurable values so you can tune the difficulty to your preference.

---

If spiders feel too aggressive — or not threatening enough — feedback is welcome.

Survival just got stickier.
